steps.title: Track the shift
steps.content: Data set B is created by adding $46$ to every value in data set A. This shifts every value to the right by the same amount.

steps.title: Compare center and spread
steps.content:
Adding the same number to every value increases the median by that number, but it does not change the distance between the smallest and largest values. So the median increases, and the range stays the same.
The answer is A.
